title: Overdosed
lyrics: Cold, dark in my eyes Can't see light in here, nah, nah, nah There's dark here in my eyes No search for life or find nothing The frequencies of a heart dead On the pavement, chalk outline Three days grace from you see my face Oh, and you don't wanna risk The sight of me you didn't hear Would you, would you wanna be here What you've done, I'm sorry it's this way I've said it a thousand times every single way When I'm with you I overdose, overdose Oh, son, the look, the taste, the feel of a fantasy Am I here or is it my destiny to die in the night Watching you from far silence I almost breathe again Almost heal again Man, I'm overdosing on you and what you used to do How you were something more than just this fucking show A preposterous, mal-gaming overdose on the end of us Overdosed on everything I couldn't touch And I remember all of it so much I can't go on thinking it's just the way our book dies I am replying, but are you just kidding me Stop me, oh, stop me if not Well, you battled away my brains in my lungs And I thought I'd let a piece of comfort insane you Cause I'm overdosed So long, there ain't no more For the things I know you never had to be You said to me, overdose, you're dead to me When you told you're dead to me, when you overdosed Oh, and what you think you've run in power I watched you fall apart by your death tonight I kill you once and I could kill you again Oh, I'm ready to die My friend, I owe you my life and I am You overdosed on your fear If you overdosed on your fear, we'd die here I'm on your side, lift me up, kill me I'm on your side, lift me up, kill me

lyricsSegments.text: Cold, dark in my eyes Can't see light in here, nah, nah, nah
There's dark here in my eyes No search for life or find nothing
The frequencies of a heart dead On the pavement, chalk outline
Three days grace from you see my face
Oh, and you don't wanna risk The sight of me you didn't hear
Would you, would you wanna be here What you've done, I'm sorry it's this way
I've said it a thousand times every single way
When I'm with you I overdose, overdose
Oh, son, the look, the taste, the feel of a fantasy
Am I here or is it my destiny to die in the night
Watching you from far silence I almost breathe again
Almost heal again
Man, I'm overdosing on you and what you used to do
How you were something more than just this fucking show
A preposterous, mal-gaming overdose on the end of us
Overdosed on everything I couldn't touch
And I remember all of it so much
I can't go on thinking it's just the way our book dies
I am replying, but are you just kidding me
Stop me, oh, stop me if not
Well, you battled away my brains in my lungs
And I thought I'd let a piece of comfort insane you
Cause I'm overdosed
So long, there ain't no more
For the things I know you never had to be
You said to me, overdose, you're dead to me
When you told you're dead to me, when you overdosed
Oh, and what you think you've run in power
I watched you fall apart by your death tonight
I kill you once and I could kill you again
Oh, I'm ready to die
My friend, I owe you my life and I am
You overdosed on your fear
If you overdosed on your fear, we'd die here
I'm on your side, lift me up, kill me
I'm on your side, lift me up, kill me
